AreaManyar, Surabaya
ForWork, community, and hangouts

Our story

A story that started in August 2024.

Pernah Dekat was built as an inclusive neighborhood space: a coffee shop where ideas, friendships, and small gatherings can begin at the same table.

Since opening on August 10, 2024, the shop has welcomed focused work sessions, late-night talks, and community moments in Manyar.

Open sinceAugust 10, 2024

A place to feel close again.

The space

Three areas for work, community, and events.

01

2nd Floor Indoor AC

A comfortable air-conditioned area for study, focused work, and small discussions.

02

3rd Floor Smoking Indoor

A relaxed indoor smoking floor for longer talks and late coffee sessions.

03

Event Floors

The 2nd and 3rd floors can host community events, watch parties, live music, and intimate gatherings.

Menu highlights

Companions for a full table.

From easy coffee to kopitiam-style plates, the menu is built for work sessions, late nights, and shared stories.

Work session

Milk Coffee and Warm Bread

For a clearer morning, an open laptop, and a steady pace.

Late hangout

Coffee, Tea, and Kopitiam Plates

Made for long talks, shared tables, and nights that do not end too early.

Community table

Sharing Bites

For gatherings, watch parties, live music, and small discussions.

Open full menu

Pernah Dekat FAQ

Before you drop by.

Clear answers about our location, opening hours, reservations, facilities, events, payments, and online ordering.

Where is Pernah Dekat located and what are its opening hours?

Pernah Dekat is at Jl. Raya Manyar No. 29, Menur Pumpungan, Sukolilo, Surabaya, East Java 60284. The cafe opens daily from 10:00 AM until 2:00 AM, making it suitable for meals, work sessions, and late-night hangouts in Surabaya.

Does a reservation require a deposit or minimum purchase?

Reservations require no deposit, minimum number of guests, or additional minimum spending. Each guest is required to order at least one food item and one drink. Payment is made at the cafe on the day of the visit.

How do I reserve Pernah Dekat for an event or group gathering?

Reservations can be made through Pernah Dekat's WhatsApp. Early booking is strongly recommended for busy occasions because capacity may fill up. The order list can be sent during booking or no later than one day before the visit.

How are the floors and event capacities arranged?

The first floor is near the cashier and kitchen. The air-conditioned second floor is non-smoking and accommodates up to 30 people. The air-conditioned third floor is a smoking area suited to events above 30 people or private-room needs, subject to availability.

Can I hold a birthday or event and bring an outside cake?

Yes. Birthdays, gatherings, and other events are welcome when every guest orders at least one food item and one drink. There is no additional minimum spending, and guests may bring a birthday cake from outside.

What facilities are available for visitors and events?

Pernah Dekat provides free Wi-Fi and a prayer room. A projector is available for events, subject to availability. Please confirm any technical event requirements when making the reservation.

Which payment methods are accepted and can an order be changed?

Payment is made at the cafe on the day of the visit using cash, QRIS, or a debit card. Guest numbers and orders may be adjusted; please confirm changes as early as possible so the seating and order can be prepared.

Does Pernah Dekat offer online ordering and delivery?

Yes. Online food ordering and delivery are available through GoFood, GrabFood, and ShopeeFood. Search for Pernah Dekat in your preferred app to see the latest menu, prices, and delivery coverage.

What is the best-selling menu at Pernah Dekat?

Pernah Dekat's best seller is the Menu Paket, a bundled menu suited to guests who want food and a drink together for individual reservations or group events.

Location and reservation

Visit Pernah Dekat in Manyar.

Find us at Jl. Raya Manyar No. 29, Menur Pumpungan, Sukolilo, Surabaya, East Java 60284. We are open daily until 02.00 AM for work, meetups, and easy late-night coffee.
